Package com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.columndef

package com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.columndef
column type definitions - cast from a mysql column to JSON

    Package
    Description
    com.zendesk.maxwell.schema
    stores and updates (via SQL parsing) a view of the mysql schema

    the mysql DDL schema parser lives here.

    ColumnDef
    This class is immutable, all subclasses must be immutable and implement equals and hashCode and call this class's respective methods if the subclass has any member variables.
